---
title: "Daniel Chen, PhD, MPH"
about:
  template: solana
  image: img/me/me-ice_cream.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/chendaniely.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/chendaniely
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chendaniely/
toc: false
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a Data Science Lecturer in the [Statistics Department](https://www.stat.ubc.ca/) at the [University of British Columbia](https://www.ubc.ca/).
I also teach Data Science for the [UBC Master of Data Science](https://masterdatascience.ubc.ca/) program.

Former Data Science Educator and Developer Advocate at [Posit, PBC](https://posit.co/) (FKA RStudio, PBC).

## Education

Virginia Tech | Blacksburg, VA. 
PhD in Genetics, Bioinformatics, and Computational Biology | 2022

Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health | New York, NY. 
MPH in Epidemiology | 2014

Macaulay Honors College at The City University of New York Hunter College | New York, NY. 
BA in Psychology, Behavioral Neuroscience | 2012

:::

---

Hello! I'm slowly porting my website from [blogdown](https://pkgs.rstudio.com/blogdown/) to [quarto](https://quarto.org/),
so things might be weird.
